summary: Iter 24 frontend-only verification PASSED end-to-end. Validated all 11 spec items: (1) Sidebar 'LLM Judge' link rendered between Datasets and Compare with Scale icon, routes to /judge-config, highlights active. (2) Standalone /judge-config renders [data-testid=judge-config-page] with H1 'LLM Test Judge', Configuration card and the form (textarea/select/save/reset) + default/customized badge. (3) Model dropdown shows EXACTLY 2 options ['gemini-flash-latest', 'gpt-5.5']; no 'Custom…' option and no [data-testid=judge-model-custom] free-text input on either surface. (4) Page round-trip: PUT 200, GET returns is_default:false + saved values; Reset restores is_default:true + 'gemini-flash-latest'. (5) Live validation: clearing prompt or removing {candidate} disables Save; token pills toggle ✓/✗ on every keystroke. (6) RunEvalModal Step 2 testing_agent_mode: [data-testid=open-judge-config] still opens [data-testid=judge-config-dialog] using the same JudgeConfigForm; dialog dropdown also shows exactly 2 options; save from dialog persists AND updates the [data-testid=judge-config-summary] card behind it. (7) Shared state confirmed: saving on /judge-config (gpt-5.5 + TEST_iter24 prompt) → reopening the dialog from Run Eval Step 2 pre-loads the SAME custom prompt + model (no stale defaults). (8) Batched submit stamps judge config: 2 testing_agent_bench datasets → exactly ONE POST /api/eval/testing-agent-evals with top-level judge_prompt + judge_model = 'gemini-flash-latest' (last persisted), items[2]. (9) Backward compat: seeded judge_model='claude-sonnet-4-5' via direct PUT → page loads without crash, dropdown silently coerces displayed value to 'gemini-flash-latest', stored doc NOT mutated (GET still returns claude-sonnet-4-5); dropdown still exposes only the 2 allowed options (no claude leak). (10) scratch_bench regression: Step 2 does NOT render judge-config-summary; POST /api/eval/jobs body keys are exactly ['evals','group_run_id','user_id'] with NO judge_* keys. (11) JobDetail llm-judge-raw-card from iter 23 unchanged code (verified in iter 23 report — no regression in this iter since JudgeRawBlock files untouched).
critical_code_review_comments: Single source of truth for the form (JudgeConfigForm) cleanly shared by both the page and the dialog — refactor is correct. The MODEL_OPTIONS constant + FALLBACK_MODEL coercion at the picker (not server-side) is a good non-destructive backward-compat strategy.
JudgeConfigPage uses a formKey bump on onSaved to re-mount the form for fresh badge/timestamp — clean. No leakage between page and dialog state observed.

Minor: when the stored doc has a non-allowed model (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-5), the 'customized' badge stays on but the dropdown silently shows gemini-flash-latest. The user could be surprised that hitting Save would now overwrite their previous choice. Spec explicitly accepted this UX, so flagging only — consider a small inline hint like 'previous value `claude-sonnet-4-5` not in this list — will be replaced if you save' for clarity.

AppShell.js navItems definition lives inside the module body (not memoised) — fine, predates this iter. The previously-flagged 'unstable-nested-component' lint warning for NavContent inside AppShell is unchanged from iter 23; cosmetic, not blocking.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 transient eval runs as side-effects of batched-submit tests: TEST_iter24_dlg (2-job testing_agent_bench) and TEST_iter24_scratch (1-job scratch_bench). Judge config left in DEFAULT state at end of run (final POST /api/eval/judge-config/reset confirmed is_default:true).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter 24 UI work verified clean. Key data-testids: judge-config-page, judge-config-summary, open-judge-config, judge-config-dialog, judge-prompt-textarea, judge-model-select, judge-config-save, judge-config-reset, judge-config-cancel. Note: judge-model-custom MUST NOT exist on either surface (verified absent). Sidebar testid: nav-llm judge (lowercase, space preserved from label.toLowerCase()). Run Eval submit button testid: submit-eval-button. POST /api/eval/testing-agent-evals body shape: { group_run_id, user_id, items[], judge_prompt, judge_model }. POST /api/eval/jobs (scratch_bench) body shape: { evals, group_run_id, user_id } — must NEVER contain judge_* keys. Backward-compat coercion at picker only — server doc unchanged until user clicks Save.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found in iter 24 refactor.
